errors.unauthenticated: You must be signed in to manage notifications.

ui.empty_description: When someone reacts, comments, quotes or mentions your posts, you'll see it here.

overview.title: Notifications — Overview
overview.description: End-user notifications generated by social events. Zero-latency fanout via DB trigger on posts_outbox.

settings.title: Notifications — Settings
settings.dedup_window_minutes_help: A notification with the same recipient, type, post, actor within this window is skipped.
settings.list_page_size_help: How many notifications to load per batch in the /notifiche list.
settings.retention_days_help: Notifications older than N days are deleted by the daily cleanup cron. Valid range: 7-3650. Default 180 (6 months).
settings.achievements_section_help: Special notifications when a post hits an engagement threshold. DB trigger checks inline (no cron). Defaults are dev/alpha-friendly — raise once real users show up.
settings.viral_likes_enabled_help: Emit a notification when the post crosses the reaction threshold within the window. Fires once per post.
settings.viral_likes_threshold_help: Total reactions needed to fire the viral notification. Default 50 (beta preset).
settings.viral_likes_window_hours_help: Time from post publication within which the reactions threshold must be reached. After this window the post no longer qualifies as viral.
settings.viral_comments_enabled_help: Emit a notification when the post crosses the comments threshold within the window. Fires once per post.
settings.viral_comments_threshold_help: Total comments needed to fire the notification. Default 10 (beta preset) — comments are a stronger signal than reactions.
settings.viral_comments_window_hours_help: Time from post publication within which the comments threshold must be reached.
settings.viral_reposts_enabled_help: Emit a notification when the post crosses the reposts threshold within the window. Fires once per post.
settings.viral_reposts_threshold_help: Total reposts needed to fire the notification. Default 5 (beta preset) — repost is the strongest engagement signal.
settings.viral_reposts_window_hours_help: Time from post publication within which the reposts threshold must be reached.
settings.email_section_help: Achievement notifications are sent by email to the post author. The cron `modules-notifications-achievement-email` (see Cron tab) processes the backlog every 20 minutes. Per-user opt-out coming with PR-4.
settings.email_send_enabled_help: Global kill-switch: if disabled, notifications stay in-app/realtime but no email goes out. Default: enabled.
settings.email_grace_seconds_help: How long to wait after a notification is created before the cron picks it up. Buffer to avoid race conditions with the fanout trigger. Default 30.

email.intro: Subject, body and footer of achievement emails. Values saved here override the code-side defaults. Leave a field empty to fall back to the default. Mustache {{token}} placeholders are interpolated at runtime.
email.viral_likes_help: Email sent when the post crosses the reactions threshold within the window. Fires once per post.
email.viral_comments_help: Email sent when the post crosses the comments threshold within the window.
email.viral_reposts_help: Email sent when the post is reposted N times within the window. Counted on the TARGET (quoted post's author).

moderation.banned: Your account has been suspended for reaching 3 strikes
moderation.strike_revoked: One of your strikes has been revoked by a moderator

achievement.post_viral_likes: Your post is going viral: {total_count} reactions in just hours
achievement.post_viral_comments: Your post is starting a conversation: {total_count} comments in just hours
achievement.post_viral_reposts: Your post is being widely shared: {total_count} reposts in just hours
